title: Command Center — Maintenance toolkit (compliance and tests)
summary: This feature delivery replaces the Command Center Maintenance placeholder with a full operator toolkit for compliance audits, allowlisted test-suite runs, and index-adjacent pre-close validation. Server routes delegate compliance to runCompliance() and spawn fixed-argv suite commands with shell-metacharacter rejection…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and active work paths. After human acceptance, SDK advances to complete and delegates close-artifacts archival to librarian.
review.spec_contracts_note: contracts:from_feature deferred (exit 125); three ux-spec block contracts adjudicated manually with contract run logs under .pan/work/contract-runs/.

intake.human_approval_note: Supervisor ship ratification at 2026-06-08T17:05:00Z with human_ratified_diff true; 19 touch-set maintenance paths staged plus 79 bundled sibling Command Center infrastructure files on command-center-overhaul…
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
